title: thelypteris × boottii f. multiflora
intro: Thelypteris × boottii f. multiflora, also known as multiflora maidenhair fern, is a rare and unique variety of fern that is often used in herbal medicine. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The multiflora maidenhair fern is also known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and promoting respiratory health, due to its expectorant properties. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
